rationale.D1: Confirmed full IO layer: every mechanism (climb, turret, hood, shooter, indexer, intake pivot+roller, drive modules, gyro, vision) has an interface + TalonFX/hardware impl + Sim impl, selected via REAL/SIM/REPLAY switch in RobotContainer; no generic parameterized base so not L4.
rationale.D2: GameState tracks match timing and alliance but is not a coordinator — it has no goal-fanout API to other subsystems; teleop control is all button bindings in RobotContainer, so this is command-composition L1, not a Superstructure L3.
rationale.D3: MapleSim full drivetrain dynamics (SwerveDriveSimulation + IntakeSimulation from ironmaple) with REAL/SIM/REPLAY mode switch confirmed in RobotContainer; mechanism IOSim classes (climb, pivot, shooter, turret) are stubs with no physics, so whole-robot sim workflow earns L3 but not L4.
rationale.D4: No src/test directory and no test files exist in the repo; CI runs `./gradlew build` which compiles only, not tests.
rationale.D5: AdvantageKit with @AutoLog inputs structs and Logger.processInputs confirmed in every subsystem (drive/gyro, climb, turret, vision, intake roller+pivot, indexer, hood, shooter); full-match logging to file is the intended workflow.
rationale.D6: Choreo trajectories actively loaded via Choreo.loadTrajectory() in Autos.java (CENTERRUSH_LEFT, DEPOT_LEFT, DEPOT_CENTER, etc.) with AutoRoutine/AutoTrajectory API; PathPlanner .path/.auto files also present and wired via AutoBuilder in Drive — both planners used in competition autos.
rationale.D7: VisionIO interface with VisionIOPhotonVision + VisionIOSim impls; std-dev tuning, pose rejection logic, and multi-camera consumer pattern all confirmed in Vision.java; addVisionMeasurement wired via RobotContainer; no dedicated RobotState class or TimeInterpolatableBuffer so not L4.
rationale.D8: Real README with build badge, CI build workflow (build.yml), Checkstyle + Spotless configured in build.gradle; no separate team library repo across seasons, discounting the candidate L3 from ci_workflows count (only one season repo workflow present).

D2: src/main/java/frc/robot/subsystems/gamestate/GameState.java:13 — SubsystemBase tracking match state only, no cross-subsystem goal fanout
